title: Butcher's Deerhunting (Yi Xi)
description: Adds a minor, funny, slightly terrifying stalker to your worlds, along with cool weapons, tools, items, and a new material system to make them.
body:
**WARNING! This mod utilizes the nausea effect at a high amplitude, which may be uncomfortable for some players.**

This is a small mod that adds a stalking entity, intended for a singleplayer world (though it should work in multiplayer). They will stalk and hunt the player, disappearing away if they lose their target; but never letting go of their presence.

They _are_ defeatable, however, and the player can strengthen against them if the cards are played correctly. They are vulnerable to certain things for the player's advantage, so use those!

This mod also adds steel tools, with a few deviating from the usual toolset design. Players will have to fabricate the steel themselves with new materials and processes found in this mod. It also adds a biome that expands upon the already existing cherry blossom biome, along with a butcherhouse structure that can generate in it.

Someone else can appear if anyone was wondering. Only if you eat The Pear, I suppose?
